name: CAN CAPL Functions
title: CAN CAPL Functions
description: Returns the signal name at indexed positions (start bit) in the payload of a CAN message for CAN networks. (Form 1)
Returns the signal name at indexed positions (start bit) of a PDU for CAN networks. (Form 2)
tables: CAN Only available with option .CAN. These CAPL functions are supported by Windows and Linux. The functionality under Linux has not been fully tested yet.
